title: Buttery Crunchy Irish White Chocolate Chips Crumble
description: This dessert features white chocolate chips and a crunchy crumble topping that's perfect for brunch or as a quick snack. It's sugar-free-friendly and ideal for those looking for a guilt-free treat.

ingredients.name: Pumpkin pie filling (optional for extra flavor)
ingredients.notes: This can be omitted if you prefer a lighter dessert.

instructions: In a bowl, mix the white chocolate chips with half of the Nutella and coconut flakes. Press this mixture into the bottom of a baking dish.
If using pumpkin pie filling, spread it evenly over the top of the crumble layer.
Mix the remaining Nutella with 1/2 cup of water until smooth. Pour this on top of the crumble layer.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and set to the touch.
